Voyagers

Age 14 - 19

Get Started

The next trip

Ever dreamt of seeing the Eiffel Tower? Or wandering the charming streets of Germany? Join us from 27.10.2025 - 31.10.2025 for an unforgettable journey through Paris and Cologne.

Book Today

Book Your Trip

Prices start at £2199 per person.
This package is designed to provide maximum peace of mind for parents and institutions.

Included

  • Return flights from London Gatwick & all local travel
  • Secure and vetted accommodations
  • 24/7 professional supervision
  • Language practice opportunities
  • Entrance fees to all attractions
  • All daily meals

Daily Activities

Day 1

Cologne Old Town scavenger hunt & Rhine cruise

Day 2

Cologne Cathedral & Chocolate Museum

Day 3

Versailles Palace

Day 4

Louvre, Eiffel Tower, Musée d’Art Moderne

Day 5

Paris food market & scavenger hunt

Optional Extras

Single Room Upgrade (£250)
